subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through the grace of the All-Merciful, the Ark of Utterance surgeth and saileth upon the Ocean of Divine Knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل رحمن سفینه بیان بر بحر عرفان جاری و ساریست حرکت و سیر آن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
